title: Bridge Essay: Interoception, Insula, and Autonomic Integration: Relevance to the Expression and Treatment of Psychiatric Symptoms.
concept: Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.
**Phase context:** Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

**Interoception, Insula, and Autonomic Integration: Relevance to the Expression and Treatment of Psychiatric Symptoms.** — Curr Top Behav Neurosci (2025). DOI: 10.1007/7854_2024_518. PMID: 39531201. The mind is embodied, and this is relevant to mental health and psychiatric illness. Interoception is the body-to-brain axis of sensory information flow and its representation at the neural and psychological levels. Interoception is the purported basis for motivation and emotion, and as an inescapable stream of information about the health and functioning of the whole organism, it is proposed to be the foundation to the conscious unitary sense of self.
